text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
There's a race today. I go to watch,<n>and see that
there's some commotion<n>on the track.

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
Hishi Amazon and another runner are<n>talking
about something...

text_block_list.name: Hishi Amazon
text_block_list.text:
It's just you and me! I'm not gonna<n>go easy on
you!

text_block_list.name: Hishi Amazon
text_block_list.text:
Hey. Well, it seems like she's been in<n>a slump
recently.

text_block_list.name: Hishi Amazon
text_block_list.text: I told her she should just think about<n>beating me.

text_block_list.name: Hishi Amazon
text_block_list.text:
It's not like I'm gonna lose, though!<n>Throw a few
cheers our way if ya feel<n>like it. See ya!

text_block_list.name: Umamusume A
text_block_list.text: ...Hishiama! I'm definitely going to<n>win!

text_block_list.name: Hishi Amazon
text_block_list.text:
That's the right attitude! All right,<n>we're going to
do this for real!

text_block_list.name: Umamusume A
text_block_list.text: Huff, huff, huff...

text_block_list.name: Hishi Amazon
text_block_list.text: (Huh... She's running pretty well<n>now.)

text_block_list.name: Hishi Amazon
text_block_list.text:
(Now to break out from the back of<n>the pack and
get on her heels... Let's<n>go!)

text_block_list.name: Hishi Amazon
text_block_list.text:
You've got a long way to go before<n>you can
block the great Hishiama!<n>Haaaaah!

text_block_list.name: Umamusume A
text_block_list.text: No way! She passed me!

text_block_list.name: Caster
text_block_list.text:
Hishi Amazon! Hishi Amazon has<n>taken first
place! She made a<n>comeback in the last half of
the race<n>and took the lead! What a surprising<n>
victory!

text_block_list.name: Hishi Amazon
text_block_list.text: Hehe! It was barely a workout!

text_block_list.name: Umamusume A
text_block_list.text:
...You crushed me. But, thanks to your<n>advice,
I've managed to break free<n>from my slump!

text_block_list.name: Hishi Amazon
text_block_list.text:
Glad to hear it. You were tearing up<n>the track out
there!

text_block_list.name: Hishi Amazon
text_block_list.text:
From now on, if you ever hit a wall<n>like that, just
run right through it<n>without a second thought!

text_block_list.name: Hishi Amazon
text_block_list.text: Your path will become clear!

text_block_list.name: Umamusume A
text_block_list.text: I will!
